//1: This is the 'Identity Card' for your Frontend (React) app.
name: summer-code
//2: Commands to start and build your frontend.
//3: The 'ingredients' (libraries) used to build your website.

dependencies.//4: Vite: The fast build tool that runs your local server.
dependencies.//5: React: The core library for building the UI components.
dependencies.//6: Lucide-React: The library used for all those beautiful icons.
dependencies.//7: Google-OAuth: Used for the 'Sign in with Google' feature.

//8: Tools used only during development (not in the final website).

devDependencies.//9: ESLint: A 'Spellchecker' for your code that finds bugs as you type.
devDependencies.//10: @Types: Provides 'Autofill' suggestions in VS Code for React.
devDependencies.//11: Vite Plugin: A bridge that allows Vite to understand and process React files.
devDependencies.//12: Tailwind/PostCSS: The engine that converts your CSS classes into a real stylesheet.
devDependencies.//13: Autoprefixer: Makes sure your CSS works on all browsers (Chrome, Safari, etc.).
devDependencies.//14: Vite: The builder. It packages your code into a small, fast website bundle.
